title: BCSI Destruction and Sanitization Evidence from ITAD Tickets

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=itsm sourcetype=itad:disposal status="completed" earliest=-365d
| rename asset_serial as serial
| join type=left serial [
    search index=itsm sourcetype=itad:wipe_cert earliest=-365d
    | stats latest(wipe_method) as method latest(cert_id) as cert by serial
  ]
| where bcsi_stored="true" AND isnull(cert)
| table disposal_id, serial, asset_tag, completed_at, cert
value: We correlate IT asset disposal tickets with wipe certificates indexed as structured events for sanitization evidence.
implementation: (1) Require vendors to upload certificate metadata to ITSM. (2) Alert when disposal closes without cert. (3) Store PDF hashes out-of-band if needed. (4) Annual sampling by internal audit.
visualization: Table (missing certs), Single value (gap count), Timeline
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
